void_admiral.name: Void Admiral
void_admiral.description: Space-branch research leader: space-focus and capstone techs gate on a chosen leader of this branch.

ground_marshal.name: Ground Marshal
ground_marshal.description: Ground-branch research leader: ground-focus and capstone techs gate on a chosen leader of this branch.

wing_commander.name: Wing Commander
wing_commander.description: Squadron-branch research leader: squadron-focus and capstone techs gate on a chosen leader of this branch.

missile_chief.name: Missile Chief
missile_chief.description: Missile-branch research leader: missile-focus and capstone techs gate on a chosen leader of this branch.

polymath.name: Polymath
polymath.description: Generalist: grants one extra concurrent research slot instead of a branch focus.

overseer.name: Куратор
overseer.description: Command-branch research leader: automation and delegation doctrine. Gates the «Steward» protocol — handing the seat to the AI while you sleep — and future command-chain / standing-posture content on choosing this leader.
